steps: Calibrate Cobas for LDL by running dilutions of the lipid calibrator and the addition of the two direct reagents.

Sample handling as performed by the Cobas Mira Plus. a) Pipette 3 µL of sample into a cuvette slot. b) Add 225 µL of LDL Direct Reagent 1. c) Add 75 µL of LDL Direct Reagent 2. d) Mixture is incubated at 37ºC and spun for 10 minutes. e) Absorbance is measured at 600 nm.
creator: Lili Liang
